findings.reasoning: Standard Solidity 0.8 natively handles bit-masking securely for packed variables like `presaleOver`, `totalFlipReversals` (DegenerusGame.sol:1826), and `_subOf` fields (GameAfkingModule.sol:1719). The lootboxEvCap window eviction (DegenerusGameStorage.sol:1733) correctly retains the newer level via monotonic checks. Terminal decimator uses `lvl + 1` (DegenerusGameDecimatorModule.sol:1024), safely precluding any conflict since `gameOver` halts further game-level progression.

The 4 mint helpers (`_recordMintData`, `_recordLootboxMintDay`, `_recordMintStreakForLevel`, `_clearCurse`) execute sequential SLOAD-modify-SSTORE sequences without caching the packed word across boundaries. The final cached activity score correctly evaluates post-action (DegenerusGameMintModule.sol:1710), natively reading the updated, coherent packed word.

A `delegatecall` revert natively unwinds all constituent EVM state changes. When `processTicketBatch` reverts within `_handleGameOverPath` (DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:676) and is swallowed, no partially-applied ticket writes leak. The terminal drain simply targets legitimately processed buckets from prior successful operations.

`claimWinnings` observes strict CEI by executing the payout after `claimablePool` is updated (DegenerusGame.sol:1248) and before the `maybeCurse` delegatecall. In `_payoutWithStethFallback` (DegenerusGame.sol:1905), the stETH transfer correctly precedes the untrusted ETH `.call`, securing stETH backing against reentrant double-counting. The `subscribe` callback `AFFILIATE.claim` cannot recurse beneficially as `affiliateBase` is read-and-zeroed atomically (GameAfkingModule.sol:1719).

Decimator liabilities are correctly up-front aggregated into `claimablePool` synchronously upon `runDecimatorJackpot` (via `claimableDelta += spend`, DegenerusGameAdvanceModule.sol:950) or `runTerminalDecimatorJackpot` (DegenerusGameGameOverModule.sol:180). Consequently, isolated `_creditClaimable` invocations within user claims correctly update individual `balancesPacked` without double-counting `claimablePool`.
